description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly dark color scheme, featuring a mix of black and deep navy blue panels. The shoe has a white rubber sole that contrasts sharply with the upper, and the toe cap is reinforced for durability. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with black laces, and the tongue displays a circular patch with branding and a small Italian flag motif. On the outer ankle area, there is a round, raised emblem, adding a distinctive design element. The shoe appears to be constructed from a combination of synthetic leather, textile, and rubber, with a padded collar for comfort.
description: A dark high-top sneaker with a white sole, black laces, and distinctive branding details on the tongue and ankle. The shoe features a mix of synthetic leather and textile materials with a reinforced toe and padded collar.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel counter, and a small circular logo patch on the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered panel construction, white sole, and the raised circular emblem near the ankle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the standard criss-cross lacing, reinforced toe cap, and branded tongue with an Italian flag motif.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the raised ankle emblem and the shoe's overall silhouette.
attribute_logo: circular emblem on tongue and outer ankle, gray/black color
